# Richard Djarbeng

> Richard Djarbeng's website with technical and personal posts. Tech blogs on AI, space, IoT, web development, software engineering, etc + real-life adventures in East Africa, USA and Europe. Supports Dark Mode. 

## Main Sections

- [Home](https://rdjarbeng.com/) - Technical articles, blog posts about web development, AI, and IoT devices.
- [About Me](https://rdjarbeng.com/about/) - Information about Richard Djarbeng, learning journey and reflections.
- [Contact](https://rdjarbeng.com/contact/) - How to get in touch with contact form.

## Content Collections

- [Personal Blog](https://rdjarbeng.com/personal/) - Reflections and stories from real-life adventures, covering:
    - Life and travel in East Africa, USA, and Europe
    - Career reflections and milestones
    - Abstract thought experiments and ideas
- [Posts](https://rdjarbeng.com/posts/) - In-depth technical articles and tutorials focused on:
    - Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
    - Web Development & Software Engineering
    - Cloud Computing, IoT Devices, & Space Technology
- [Gallery](https://rdjarbeng.com/gallery/) - A curated collection of images and visual media highlighting:
    - Travel & Location Photography (Ghana, Rwanda, Artemis II mission, etc.)
    - AI-Generated Art (Midjourney, Gemini, etc.)
    - Hardware and tech captures
- [Memes](https://rdjarbeng.com/memes/) - A dedicated collection for tech and developer memes, spanning:
    - Developer struggles & coding humor
    - Back-end vs. Front-end jokes
    - AI hype and startup culture
- [Videos](https://rdjarbeng.com/videos/) - Short clips and video insights featuring content from YouTube, X/Twitter, and TikTok on:
    - Space Launches & Hardware showcases
    - General Tech & Coding insights
- [YouTube](https://rdjarbeng.com/youtube/) - Curated YouTube video embeds from rdjarbeng.com with multiple categories:
    - Film & Animation
    - Music
    - Gaming
    - Education
    - Entertainment
    - People & Blogs
    - Science & Technology
    - Travel & Events
    - Comedy
    - Sports
    - Behind the Scenes
    - Reviews & Reactions
    - Memes & Highlights
    - Interviews
    - Tutorials

## Navigation and Discovery

- [Search](https://rdjarbeng.com/search/) - Search through all posts and articles with dynamic UI, Quick Links, and category filtering chips.
- [Categories](https://rdjarbeng.com/categories/) - Browse all content cleanly segmented by overarching topics (e.g., Tech, Personal, AI).
- [Tags](https://rdjarbeng.com/tags/) - Find highly specific groupings of posts via granular tags.
